title: Draft original citizenship practice items (MC + flashcard) covering all civics topics, cited to USCIS
context: Original, cited citizenship practice items are the core deliverable of the pilot. Items must be our own stems/distractors/rationales (no third-party question set copied), every answer cited to an official USCIS source, and dynamic items must defer to the dynamic-answer subsystem rather than a static key. MEDIUM risk-tier: accuracy-reviewer sign-off required before shipping.
objective: Draft original multiple-choice and flashcard citizenship items covering all official civics topics, each cited to a USCIS answer and passing the validator.
acceptanceCriteria: Original stems, distractors, and rationales (we do not copy any third-party question set); every item cites an official USCIS answer (100% citation coverage; validator passes)
Covers all official civics topics (principles of democracy, system of government, rights/responsibilities, American history, geography, symbols, holidays) at the plain-language target
Dynamic items reference the dynamic-answer subsystem, not a static key
